search_paipai.title: BYD 2025 Q4 margin review
search_paipai.content: The note attributes BYD's fourth-quarter gross margin improvement to battery cost reductions and a richer export mix, while warning that domestic price competition remains the main near-term risk.

rows.comment: Battery cost and export mix helped margin.

search_paipai.title: Tencent cloud and advertising investor meeting notes
search_paipai.content: Management commentary emphasized improving cloud gross margin, AI-related demand from enterprise customers, and stable advertising load growth. The note says capex discipline is still a key watch item.

search_global_data.title: Apple daily market snapshot
search_global_data.content: AAPL closed at 202.87 USD on 2026-06-04. The replay snapshot records market capitalization of 3.02 trillion USD and trailing twelve-month revenue of 392.1 billion USD.

search_global_data.title: Hang Seng Index daily snapshot
search_global_data.content: The Hang Seng Index closed at 19341.22 on 2026-06-04, up 0.6% on the day. Financials and internet platform shares were the largest positive sector contributors in the replay snapshot.

search_cn_marketdata.title: China CPI and PPI replay snapshot
search_cn_marketdata.content: The replay macro snapshot records China headline CPI at 0.4% year over year and PPI at -1.2% year over year for May 2026. Food prices were the main CPI drag while services inflation stayed positive.

search_cn_marketdata.title: CSI 300 daily replay snapshot
search_cn_marketdata.content: The CSI 300 closed at 3718.64 on 2026-06-04, up 0.4% on the day. The replay snapshot identifies consumer staples and banks as leading sector contributors.

search_web.title: Apple Form 10-Q replay excerpt
search_web.content: The replay excerpt says Apple reported net sales of 95.4 billion USD for the quarter ended March 28, 2026, with services revenue growing faster than product revenue.

search_web.title: PBOC monetary policy replay excerpt
search_web.content: The replay excerpt says the central bank emphasized keeping liquidity reasonably ample and guiding financing costs lower for the real economy.
